titleStmt.title: SII 6.1113: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1113. (A.R. No. 348 of 1899). IN THE FORTY-EIGHTH NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē ṣaṭṭurāmatriśaśiparimītē caitraśuklē ca tithyāṁ sa
ptamyāṁ śōmyavārē harigirinṛharē(ṁ) puṣpadaṁḍāṁ pradadyāt . rātrau dhūpē
ca jīyyagajapatijananī kamalādēvī dharmmaṁ nityaṁ svābhīṣṭasiddhyē prati
dinamihçō gōtrabhivṛddhyē svabhaktyā . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1336 gunēṁṭi caitra śu
ddha saptami sōmavarana gajapati pratāpavīra niśaṁkkabhaṇudēvarājula pinatālli kamalā
dēviAmmajīyyaṁgāru tanaku Ābhiṣṭhartthasiddhigānu śrīnarasihyanāthuniki nityamuna ra
tri dhupaAvasaramaṁdunu cātanu tōṭatō doḍavanamala samarppiṁsenu Idulakunu nityamu
nnu tecci peṭṭanu bumi Annamannu Anavala Anamannu Iddaṟavaśamu Adu Ēka cayagā
nu canu gaṁḍamaḍalu 10 padinni peṭṭi Iṁdulaku puṣpavaṭika gaṭlu 2 reṁḍunnu koni
peṭiri I doṁḍa ĀcadrarkkastaIganu Ī Iddaṟunnu peṭṭhaṁgalāru I gaṭukai
maḍalu 3 vīrivasana peṭiri I doḍa AsadrarkkastaIga peṭaṁgalāḍu I dha
rmmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
